name: Lexi Limousine Svc Le
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Listed as a local transit/limo service at 487 Washington Ave, Cliffside Park, NJ (201-941-6727). No public website confirmed.
fit_notes: Sub-scale 3-employee limo/car service in Bergen County. Likely too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; possible SPED route operator under a Bergen Co. district but unverified. Pass unless aggregating micro-operators.

name: Romah Chariot
recent_news: No M&A or operating news found. Distinct from 'Roman Chariot Bus & Van Sales' (Hasbrouck Heights) and 'Roman Chariot' auto sales (Manalapan). Listed at 38 Central Ave #B6, Ridgefield Park, NJ.
fit_notes: Tiny single-vehicle Bergen County operator. Too small to stand alone as a Summit tuck-in; no fleet, contracts, or succession signal verifiable. Pass.

name: Sargon Car & Limousine Svc
recent_news: Sargon Limousine has operated a chauffeured transportation service in northern NJ/NYC since 2005, based in Dumont, NJ (sargonlimousine.com). No evidence of school-bus or SPED contracts; appears to be a general chauffeur/airport limo service.
fit_notes: General chauffeured car/limo service, not a school-bus contractor. Outside Summit's tuck-in thesis (student transportation). Pass.

name: Viktors Limousine Svc LLC
recent_news: No M&A or news. Multiple similarly named Viktor's/Victor's Limo operations exist in Bergen Co. (Fort Lee, Haworth, Demarest); unclear if Fair Lawn entity is related. No website confirmed for the 18 Harlow Cres, Fair Lawn LLC.
fit_notes: Sub-scale Bergen Co. limo LLC; likely a sole-operator livery business, possibly running a SPED Type-S vehicle. Too small for a stand-alone Summit tuck-in. Pass.

name: World Class Transportation
recent_news: LinkedIn profile of Jose Luna at World Class Transportation, Inc. describes warehouse ops and drayage/distribution serving NJ/PA/NY from the Port of NY/NJ - i.e., a freight/drayage operator, NOT a school-bus contractor. Clifton, NJ location reportedly closed per Yelp; an LLC with DOT# 3845787 also exists.
fit_notes: Appears to be a port drayage/freight logistics operation, not a student-transportation contractor. Out of scope for Summit. Pass.
